_comment: Illustrative fragment of a Shippo-backed business UCP profile served at /.well-known/ucp. Shows the `ucp.capabilities` map. Two things are declared: (1) the Tech-Council-governed dev.ucp.shopping.fulfillment extension, which Shippo IMPLEMENTS (Shippo does not and cannot redefine it), and (2) the com.shippo.shipping.rate_detail companion annotation extension, which decorates the fulfillment options with Shippo-native identifiers. Per UCP namespace governance, the `schema` URL of a com.shippo.* entry MUST originate from shippo.com (its namespace authority domain); a platform MUST validate that binding and reject entries that fail it. The dev.ucp.* schema URL is anchored on ucp.dev, its authority domain.
